---
id: provisioning-profile-confirm
title: "Confirm a provisioning profile upload"
description: "This is the last step of the upload process. Confirm the provisioning profile upload and view the file on the Code Signing tab of a specific app. Read more in our [Confirming the iOS code signing file upload](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-ios-code-signing-files/#confirming-the-ios-code-signing-file-upload) guide."
sidebar_label: "Confirm a provisioning profile upload"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Confirm a provisioning profile upload"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/provisioning-profiles/{provisioning-profile-slug}/uploaded"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This is the last step of the upload process. Confirm the provisioning profile upload and view the file on the Code Signing tab of a specific app. Read more in our [Confirming the iOS code signing file upload](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-ios-code-signing-files/#confirming-the-ios-code-signing-file-upload) guide.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./provisioning-profile-confirm.ParamsDetails.json")}
>

>
